profile.name: Jay Patel
profile.title: Software Developer and Machine Learning Builder
profile.tagline: I build data-driven products, simulation systems, and desktop-ready ML tools.

codingProjects.title: LoL Stat Tracker
codingProjects.shortDescription: A local-first League of Legends analytics and coaching app with ML insights and timeline-aware analysis.
codingProjects.fullDescription: Built an end-to-end analytics system that ingests Riot match plus timeline data, engineers features, trains win prediction models, and returns coaching recommendations through both a FastAPI backend and an Electron desktop shell.
codingProjects.problem: Players had raw match stats but no structured way to turn those stats into specific, high-impact improvements.
codingProjects.solution: Created a pipeline for ingest/build/train/report, added contextual intelligence and performance scoring, and packaged the experience into a desktop app that can be shared without exposing API keys.
codingProjects.aiSummary: A full ML-powered coaching platform for League of Legends that combines timeline features, model predictions, and actionable performance guidance.

codingProjects.title: Civilization Machine Learning Simulator
codingProjects.shortDescription: A deterministic agent-based civilization simulator with real-time visualization and headless batch analytics.
codingProjects.fullDescription: Designed and built a seeded simulation engine that models civilizations through rule-based decisions, expansion, conflict, stochastic events, migration, and collapse behavior, with real-time Pygame rendering and structured run logs for analysis.
codingProjects.problem: Most toy simulations are visually interesting but hard to reproduce, benchmark, or analyze at scale.
codingProjects.solution: Implemented deterministic world generation, controllable runtime modes, and batch/headless runs that output JSON and CSV logs for repeatable analysis and balancing.
codingProjects.role: Solo developer (simulation engine, visualization, systems design)
codingProjects.aiSummary: A reproducible civilization simulation platform combining deterministic worldgen, agent behavior dynamics, and visual plus headless experimentation workflows.

codingProjects.title: Personal Finance Tracker
codingProjects.shortDescription: A local-first finance dashboard for tracking income, expenses, budgets, and monthly cashflow trends.
codingProjects.fullDescription: Built a standalone personal finance web app with transaction management, monthly filtering, category budgeting, trend visualization, and CSV/JSON export while keeping all data local in the browser.
codingProjects.problem: People need a quick way to monitor spending and budget performance without complex setup or cloud dependencies.
codingProjects.solution: Designed a zero-backend, browser-based tracker with clean UX, persistent local storage, and useful monthly insights that run entirely on the client.
codingProjects.role: Solo developer (product design, frontend architecture, data modeling)
codingProjects.aiSummary: A local-first finance tracking app that combines budgeting, transaction analytics, and exportable records in a single lightweight experience.
